olmo.issue: The figure grouping the logo image has no accessible name.
olmo.suggested_fix: Add aria-label="University logo figure" to the figure.

olmo.issue: Grade table header cells still use rowspan and colspan without scope; associations remain semantically incorrect.
olmo.suggested_fix: A human should rebuild the header associations for this complex table.

gemini.issue: Figure wrapping the image lacks an accessible name for assistive technology.
gemini.suggested_fix: Add aria-label="University logo figure" to the figure element.
